title: audit — OpenTelemetry metrics
description: Audit-side ops metrics — fire rate, purge cadence, retention-policy churn, export request rate, archive migration health. Distinct from analytics.json (which would be growth-facing behavioral metrics; audit does NOT emit growth analytics). Metrics feed the on-call Grafana dashboard + AuditFireRateAnomaly + PurgeJobLiveness probes.

metrics.name: academorix.audit.records_total
metrics.description: Cumulative audit row count. Incremented on every AuditRecorded event afterCommit. Feeds AuditFireRateAnomaly probe.

metrics.name: academorix.audit.records_rate_gauge
metrics.description: Instantaneous audit fire rate per tenant. Sampled every 30s over a rolling 1h window. Compared against 7d baseline in FireRateAnomalyProbe.

metrics.name: academorix.audit.records_by_event_total
metrics.description: Cross-tenant rollup by event name. Cardinality bounded by the audited-events catalog (~ dozens).

metrics.name: academorix.audit.purge.total
metrics.description: PurgeExpiredAuditsJob execution counter (per tenant per nightly run).

metrics.name: academorix.audit.rows_purged_total
metrics.description: Cumulative rows purged by the retention runner. Delta per run is available via query.

metrics.name: academorix.audit.purge.duration_ms
metrics.description: Time to complete PurgeExpiredAuditsJob per tenant. Distribution over the past 30 days.

metrics.name: academorix.audit.retention_policies_active_gauge
metrics.description: Active AuditRetentionPolicy count per application. Sampled hourly. Baseline is low (Enterprise-only).

metrics.name: academorix.audit.retention_policies_expiring_soon_gauge
metrics.description: Policies with override_ends_at within 30 days. Sampled hourly. Drives the AuditRetentionExtensionExpiringSoonNotification cadence.

metrics.name: academorix.audit.exports.row_count_histogram
metrics.description: Distribution of export payload row counts. Useful for capacity planning + spotting unusually large exports.

metrics.name: academorix.audit.archive_migration_rows_total
metrics.description: Cumulative rows migrated from hot to cold archive. ExportAuditsToArchiveJob emits this delta per run.

metrics.name: academorix.audit.archive_bucket_object_count_gauge
metrics.description: S3 archive object count per application (measured via S3 inventory). Sampled daily.

metrics.name: academorix.audit.immutability_violations_total
metrics.description: Attempts to UPDATE an audit row (refused by AuditObserver::updating). SHOULD BE ZERO in a healthy environment. Non-zero triggers security-alert-level notifications.

metrics.name: academorix.audit.delete_violations_total
metrics.description: Attempts to DELETE an audit row outside PurgeExpiredAuditsJob (refused by AuditObserver::deleting). SHOULD BE ZERO.

metrics.name: academorix.audit.raw_diff_reveals_total
metrics.description: Successful ?include=raw_diff reveals. Every reveal writes a chain-of-custody row (meta-audit). Feeds the compliance investigation dashboard.
